title: Boomi Integration Process
description: Represents a Boomi integration process — an automated workflow that moves and transforms data between connected applications. Processes consist of a start shape (trigger), action shapes (steps), and optional decision logic.

id.description: Unique component ID of the integration process (UUID format).

name.description: Display name of the integration process.

type.description: Component type. Always 'process' for integration processes.

folderId.description: ID of the folder containing this process within the component library.

deleted.description: Whether this process has been deleted from the component library.

currentVersion.description: Version identifier of the current saved version of this process.

createdDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the process was created.

modifiedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the process was last modified.

schedules.description: Scheduling configurations for running this process on a time-based trigger.

deployments.description: Active deployments of this process across environments.

ProcessSchedule.title: Process Schedule
ProcessSchedule.description: A time-based schedule that triggers a Boomi integration process to run automatically.

atomId.description: ID of the Atom on which the scheduled process runs.

processId.description: ID of the process this schedule belongs to.

minutes.description: Minute field of the cron expression.

hours.description: Hour field of the cron expression.

daysOfWeek.description: Days-of-week field of the cron expression.

daysOfMonth.description: Days-of-month field of the cron expression.

months.description: Month field of the cron expression.

years.description: Year field of the cron expression.

ExecutionRecord.title: Execution Record
ExecutionRecord.description: A record of a single integration process execution (job run).

executionId.description: Unique identifier of this execution instance.

processId.description: ID of the process that was executed.

atomId.description: ID of the Atom that ran the process.

executionTime.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the execution started.

message.description: Status message or error details for this execution.

inboundDocumentCount.description: Number of documents processed in this execution.

errorDocumentCount.description: Number of documents that resulted in errors.

Environment.title: Environment
Environment.description: A Boomi runtime environment where Atoms are assigned and processes are deployed.

classification.description: Whether this environment is production or test.

createdDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the environment was created.

Atom.title: Atom
Atom.description: A Boomi Atom — the lightweight runtime engine that executes integration processes.

status.description: Current connectivity status of the Atom.

hostName.description: Hostname of the machine running the Atom.

currentVersion.description: Current Boomi runtime version installed on this Atom.

dateInstalled.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the Atom was installed.

purgeHistoryDays.description: Number of days to retain execution history before automatic purge.

DeployedPackage.title: Deployed Package
DeployedPackage.description: A packaged Boomi component deployed to a specific runtime environment.

deploymentId.description: Unique identifier of this deployment record.

environmentId.description: ID of the environment this package is deployed to.

packageId.description: ID of the packaged component that was deployed.

componentType.description: Type of the deployed component (process, connector, etc.).

packageVersion.description: Version label of the deployed package.

deployedDate.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this package was deployed.

active.description: Whether this deployment is currently active.
